description: Search a knowledge base and inject the results into prompts via {{kb:NAME}}.
purpose: Adaptive RAG retrieval as a chain step. Two independent axes — Trigger (when: always | LLM decides) and Query (what: last-N history | LLM rewrite). Searches the selected KBs, writes the result to a named slot, and is injected via {{kb:NAME}}. Recomputed every turn, never persisted. See docs/guides/KB_V2_RETRIEVER.md.

trigger.prompt: Decide whether the knowledge base should be searched to answer the latest user message.
trigger.outputContract: Answer with ONLY one English word — "yes" or "no". No punctuation, no explanation.

query.prompt: Rewrite the conversation into a single, standalone search query for a knowledge base. Resolve pronouns and references.
query.outputContract: Output ONLY the search query text, in the user's language. No quotes, no preamble, no explanation.

defaultConfig.emptyText: No relevant information was found in the knowledge base.
